description: Extraction templates for SwissTrust document OCR/import flows.

global_rules.dates: Use ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD when the value is known.
global_rules.currency: Use CHF numeric amounts without currency symbols when the source is Swiss Francs.
global_rules.nulls: Use null when a field is missing, unreadable, or not present on the document.
global_rules.confidence: Provide per-field confidence scores between 0 and 1.
